# Timeline

## 2024

- FTC finalizes fake reviews/testimonials rule.
- Google announces March 2024 Search spam update targeting scaled content abuse, site reputation abuse, and expired domain abuse.
- FTC/ICPEN/GPEN publish review of subscription sites/apps and possible dark patterns.

## 2025

- Rogers & Righetti publish manufactured attention paper.
- Apple publishes App Store fraud analysis covering 2024.
- Trustpilot publishes Trust Report 2025.
- Meta reports action against spammy/unoriginal content and impersonation.

## 2026

- LinkedIn announces action on engagement pods and automated comments.
- ACCC announces PhotobookShop penalties.
- Business Insider reports on elite clippers and clipping authenticity concerns.
- WIRED reports on Geese / Chaotic Good trend simulation.
- TechCrunch discusses trend simulation and creator-farm marketing.
- DOJ announces Michael Smith guilty plea for AI-assisted streaming fraud.
- Deezer reports AI-generated tracks are 44% of new uploads and 85% of streams on fully AI-generated tracks were detected as fraudulent and demonetized in 2025.
- Google publishes 2025 Ads Safety Report.
